title: lantana aculeata f. rubella
intro: Lantana aculeata f. rubella, also known as red button lantana, is a fragrant, flowering plant species native to South America, characterized by its vibrant red flowers and woody stems. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Lantana aculeata f. rubella include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
